title: Name input component for user identification fields
purpose: Provides a reusable text input field for capturing user names in editing and review workflows with support for labels, placeholders, and validation.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named NameInput that accepts various props for customization and includes default values for optional parameters. Also exports the component as default.

steps.content: Generate a unique ID for the input element.
Render a container div with flex column layout and optional class names.
IF a label is provided, render a label element associated with the input ID.
IF the label is required, append a red asterisk to indicate requirement.
Render an input element with text type and bind its value to the provided prop.
Attach an event handler to update the value via the onChange prop when input changes.
Apply default placeholder text and required/disabled states from props.
Style the input with Tailwind classes for appearance and focus states.
